description_long: This obelisk features a robust, square structure with a wide, flat top and a slightly tapered base, all rendered in a stone-like material. Four thick pillars support the upper platform, each adorned with glowing blue vein-like patterns that give the object a mystical or technological appearance. The central section is hollow, allowing visibility through the structure from certain angles, and the interior appears dark with circular blue highlights visible from some views. The surface is textured to resemble weathered stone, with subtle irregularities and a matte finish. The overall design is monolithic and imposing, suggesting a ceremonial or landmark function in an urban environment. There are no visible inscriptions or detailed ornamentation beyond the glowing blue patterns on the pillars.
description: A square, stone-like obelisk with glowing blue veins on its pillars and a hollow, dark central section, topped by a wide, flat platform. The design is monolithic and mystical, with a weathered stone texture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, flat top and two prominent pillars with blue glowing veins, with the central hollow section appearing very dark.
description_view_1: This view reveals the hollow interior with two circular blue highlights visible inside, and the blue-veined pillars are more pronounced.
description_view_2: Similar to view 1, but the interior blue highlights are more centered, and the stone texture on the pillars is clearly visible.
description_view_3: The rear view shows the back pillars with blue veins and the dark hollow center, with less visibility of the interior blue highlights.
attribute_ornamentation: Blue glowing vein-like patterns on the pillars; no other ornamentation visible.
attribute_base_design: The base is a thick, square stone platform with beveled edges and a rough, weathered texture, providing stability and a monumental appearance.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is a wide, flat, square platform with a slightly recessed center, finished in the same stone texture as the rest of the structure, with no unique decorations.
